title: GenBank Accession Numbers of H6N8 avian influenza virus in Antarctic seabirds demonstrates connectivity between South America and Antarctica
author: de Seixas, Marina Maria Moraes
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset contains the accession numbers for 16 viral cRNA (PB2) sequences obtained from chinstrap penguin and brown skua . Scientific names, localities,  strain, serotype, isolation source and host scientific names is also included
steps_raw: This dataset contains the accession numbers for 16 viral cRNA (PB2) sequences obtained from chinstrap penguin and brown skua . Scientific names, localities,  strain, serotype, isolation source and host scientific names is also included
